indications.text:
AMRIX® (cyclobenzaprine hydrochloride extended-release capsules) is indicated as an adjunct to rest and physical therapy for relief of muscle spasm associated
with acute, painful musculoskeletal conditions. Improvement is manifested by relief of muscle spasm and its associated signs and symptoms, na...

AMRIX is indicated as an adjunct to rest and physical therapy for relief of muscle spasm
associated with acute, painful musculoskeletal conditions. Improvement is manifested by relief
of muscle spasm and its associated signs and symptoms, namely, pain, tenderness, and limitation
of motion.
AMRIX sho...
